name: Signpost
description: A weathered wooden signpost, its paint cracked and faded by years of sun and rain. Four arms point in cardinal directions: Tavern to the north, Market to the south, East Road to the east, and Blacksmith to the west.

name: Fountain
description: A stone fountain carved with leaping fish and swirling wave motifs. Cool, clear water bubbles up from a central spout and spills into the basin below. A few copper coins glint at the bottom.

name: Ale Mug
description: A thick clay mug, still half-full of dark, frothy ale. It smells of hops and something faintly smoky. The rim is chipped from countless table-slams.

name: Wanted Poster
description: A rough parchment poster nailed to the tavern wall. A crude sketch of a hooded figure stares back at you. WANTED - DEAD OR ALIVE. 500 gold. Inquire at the Guard Post.

name: Straw Mattress
description: A thin mattress stuffed with dry straw, pushed against the loft wall. It looks like it would offer only modest comfort, but it beats sleeping on the floor.

name: Cracked Window
description: A small glass pane, cracked diagonally from corner to corner. Through it you can see the town square below. The crack is stuffed with a rag to keep the wind out.

name: Bread Loaf
description: A round loaf of dark bread, still faintly warm. Its crust is hard and dusted with flour. It smells wonderfully of a wood-fired oven. The price tag reads 2 copper.

name: Strange Trinket
description: A small brass object of indeterminate purpose, covered in tiny symbols that might be runes. It feels oddly warm to the touch. The vendor claims it brings luck.

name: Health Potion
description: A small glass vial stopped with a cork, filled with a vivid crimson liquid. It glows faintly in dim light. The label reads: Restores vitality. Do not mix with moonwort extract.

name: Mysterious Powder
description: A twist of paper filled with a fine, iridescent powder that shifts between silver and green. It smells faintly of pine and ozone. The alchemist watches you closely when you touch it.

name: Broken Arrow
description: A snapped arrow shaft with the fletchings still attached, goose feathers dyed red. The head is missing. The wood is old and weathered.

name: Odd Mushroom
description: A pale, knobby mushroom with dark spots ringed in faint violet. It does not match any species you recognise. It smells earthy and faintly sweet. Eating it seems unwise.

name: Glowing Mushroom
description: A cluster of large mushrooms that emit a steady, cool blue-white bioluminescence. Running your finger along the cap leaves a faint glowing smear.

name: Animal Tracks
description: A series of large paw prints pressed deep into the soft earth. Four toes, no claw marks. The tracks lead deeper into the forest and do not return.

name: Fresh Paw Prints
description: A neat line of fresh paw prints pressed into damp soil. The stride is steady and purposeful, and the trail bends toward denser brush to the east.

name: Mossy Stone
description: A low standing stone draped in velvet-green moss. Someone has scratched a small paw symbol into one side, almost hidden beneath lichen.

name: Weathered Stone
description: A broad weathered stone rises from the roots of the ancient oak. Its surface is worn smooth by time, except for a narrow slot where a blade once rested.

name: Ancient Oak
description: An immense oak tree towers above the grove, its limbs spread like a vaulted roof. Its bark is scarred with old symbols that speak of vows kept through generations.

name: Iron Sword
description: A single-edged iron sword hanging from a wall hook. The blade is solid and well-balanced. A strip of worn leather wraps the hilt. The price chalked on a slate below reads 15 silver.

name: Leather Shield
description: A round shield faced with thick boiled leather over a wooden frame. A central iron boss is riveted in place. Scuff marks at the edges hint at real use. Sturdy and light.

name: Anvil
description: A massive iron anvil bolted to a thick hardwood stump. Its top face is polished mirror-smooth from years of use, while the edges are scored with hammer nicks.

name: Obi's Oath
description: Named for Obi, the faithful hound who never left his master's side.
Legends say the blade carries the spirit of unwavering loyalty —
striking hardest when wielded in defence of those you would never abandon.
Ancient runes flicker faintly across the blade.
One line burns brighter than the rest:

He walked beside the one who shaped this world.
Not as servant.
But as friend.
prerequisiteFailMessage: The sword does not stir. Something about you feels... incomplete. As if the oath demands a witness — one that has not yet been found.

name: Worn Collar Tag
description: A small, scratched brass tag that once hung from a dog's collar.
The name Obi is etched on one side; on the other, a single worn paw print.
Whoever carries this was trusted enough to keep it.

name: Weapon Rack
description: A sturdy wooden rack holding an assortment of practice weapons — blunted blades, weighted staves, and padded clubs. Each slot is labeled with care: "Return after use."

name: Practice Sword
description: A wooden training sword, weighted to match a real blade. The edges are rounded and wrapped in leather to prevent serious injury. Ideal for beginners learning the basics of combat.

name: Archery Target
description: A large circular target made of tightly bundled straw, mounted on a wooden frame. Concentric circles are painted in red and white. Several arrows protrude from various rings, and a few have missed entirely.
